name: 🍔 Reduce Ultra-Processed Food
desc: Cap sugar, alcohol, and unhealthy fat intake at planetary health diet levels.

name: 🐔 Less Pork Poultry & Eggs
desc: Reduce pig meat poultry and egg intake towards planetary health diet levels.

name: 🐄 Less Beef & Dairy
desc: Reduce ruminant meat and dairy towards planetary health diet recommendations.

name: 🥦 More Vegetables & Fruits
desc: Increase vegetable fruit and nut consumption towards planetary health diet recommendations.

name: ⚖️ Reduce Overweight
desc: Reduce calorie intake to reduce overweight and obesity rates.

name: 🍽️ End Undernutrition
desc: Increase calorie access to eradicate underweight globally.

name: 🚯  Halve Food Waste
desc: Reduce household and retail food waste towards max 20% of intake.

name: 🚢 Liberalize Trade
desc: Shift trade toward cost-competitiveness.

name: 💰 Global Minimum Wage
desc: Raise agricultural wages towards at least $3/hour in lower-income countries.

name: 🚜 Labor-Capital Rebalancing
desc: Substitute capital with labour in overly mechanized agricultural systems.

name: 🌳 Forest Carbon Pricing (REDD+)
desc: Carbon price on deforestation to protect and regenerate forests.

name: 🌸 30x30 Land Conservation
desc: Protect 30% of global land area by 2030 — biodiversity hotspots first.

name: 🏞️ Rewet Peatlands
desc: Incentivize rewetting of drained peatlands via GHG pricing.

name: 💧 Environmental Water Flows
desc: Enforce minimum environmental water flows for ecosystems.

name: 🦋 Biodiversity Offsetting
desc: Prevent biodiversity intactness index (BII) decline in any biome — losses must be compensated elsewhere.

name: 🧪 Nitrogen Use Efficiency
desc: Improve nitrogen use effficiency by better timing, placing and quantification of fertilizer needs.

name: 🌾🌻🫛 Diverse Crop Rotations
desc: Incentivize longer more diverse crop rotations.

name: 🌿 Landscape Habitats
desc: Increase semi-natural habitats towards at least 20% of cropland area for better structured landscapes.

name: 🍚 Rice Emission Mitigation
desc: Alternate flooding direct seeding and improved residue management in rice.

name: 🐑 Livestock Productivity
desc: Improve feed efficiency in ruminant systems in low-income countries.

name: 🪣 Manure Management
desc: Anaerobic digesters for 50% of confined livestock manure.

name: 🪱 Soil Carbon Sequestration
desc: Carbon pricing to incentivize soil carbon storage.

name: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Sustainable Demographic Transition
desc: Education and development to slow population growth to 8.9 bn by 2050.

name: 🎓 Equitable Human Development
desc: Faster and more equitable growth, improved institutions and governance.

name: ⚡ Energy Transition
desc: Transform energy industry and transport to stay within 1.5°C budget.

name: 🌱 Bioplastics
desc: Use agricultural feedstocks to replace fossil-based plastics and packaging.

name: 🏗️ Timber Cities
desc: Mass timber construction sequesters carbon in buildings replacing concrete and steel.

name: ✨ Diet Package Synergy
desc: Co-benefits of a comprehensive diet shift: interacting demand changes reinforce each other beyond individual measures.

name: ✨ Biosphere Package Synergy
desc: Nature fully protected: landscape connectivity and reduced fragmentation amplify biodiversity gains.

name: ✨ Agriculture Package Synergy
desc: Farming in ecological balance: combined precision farming and habitat measures cut nitrogen and water pressure.

name: ✨ Cross-Sector Synergy
desc: System-wide transformation: energy and demographic transitions reduce food-system emissions and industry capture.

name: 🌟 Full Integration Synergy
desc: All packages combined: co-benefits amplify across demand supply biosphere and governance dimensions.
